title: RandomMobSpawnerX
description: RandomMobSpawnerX is a datapack which spawns random mobs every 10 seconds! (EnderDragon excluded)
body:
RandomMobSpawnerX spawns random mobs every 10 seconds! (EnderDragon excluded)

To toggle the DataPack, simply run ```/function random:toggle_true``` or ```/function random:toggle_false```
![Toggling the datapack via commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e9a22e657b3277c57b7bde4e36dbf34fea64da5.png)

If you want to use this datapack for your video, feel free to! All I ask for is for you to link the datapack in your description.

For Bug reporting, read the ReadMe.txt in the datapack .zip
